title: [CI:BUILD] Cirrus: Collect test-RPM artifacts
body:
When this jobs runs on a branch, the latest successful copies of these
files will be available via a consistent URL as described at:
https://cirrus-ci.org/guide/writing-tasks/#latest-build-artifacts

/cc @jwhonce

comments.body:
[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **NOT APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *cevich* To complete the [pull request process](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process), please assign **mtrmac** after the PR has been reviewed. You can assign the PR to them by writing `/assign @mtrmac` in a comment when ready. The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fpodman).
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - **[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/OWNERS)** Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment

Closing, a better/safer way to get the latest RPMs is [from @lsm5 COPR repo](https://copr.fedorainfracloud.org/coprs/rhcontainerbot/podman-next/):

`dnf copr enable rhcontainerbot/podman-next -y`
